response:
Sec. 1  
peanuts are a type of food that contains proteins which can trigger allergic reactions in some people  
allergic reactions can cause symptoms such as hives or difficulty breathing  
these reactions are not related to the physical properties of the food  
peanuts are not a liquid and cannot be consumed underwater  
people who are allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater because of the way their bodies react to the food  

Sec. 2  
the body's immune system reacts to the proteins in peanuts rather than the physical properties of the food  
this reaction does not affect the ability to live in water  
the physical properties of peanuts do not influence the allergic reaction  
people who are allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater because of the way their bodies react to the food
